blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 93). Defects: Agency identity repeated at top and footer, wasting premium candidate-attention canvas; Agency identity unnecessarily repeated across both top and bottom of the advertisement; Agency branding repeated at top and bottom wastes premium attention canvas; Dead space in middle and between interview date buttons reduces canvas utilization
